_comment: Real AutoLab research output: ALFA UAV early-warning fault detector. Higher-is-better F1 (maximize) under a FAR<=2.0/hr hard gate. Each replayed generation = the best result of a round, so the ledger shows the real arc baseline(0.000) -> 0.667 -> 0.667 -> 0.667 -> 0.800. The directive at each step is the real L3 synthesis (EXPLORE x3 -> EXPLOIT -> COMMIT). A final 'summary' block drives the completion card.
program_md:
# Early-warning fault detector for autonomous UAV flights

## Goal
From real labeled flight logs (ALFA, 47 flights), build an early-warning system that flags flights heading toward engine-failure or control-surface faults BEFORE they become dangerous. Recall-heavy; warn as early as possible.

## Experiment contract
The metric is `event_level_F1` (higher is better). Hard gate: false_alarm_rate <= 2.0 per flight hour. Also minimize detection latency.

result.description: real baseline — default config on the real validation set

plateau.evidence: Only the baseline exists; nothing to plateau on yet.

stagnation.evidence: No repeated approaches in the ledger.

directive.rationale: The default fixed-threshold detector NEVER FIRES on this data (F1=0.000, latency=never). An adaptive threshold calibrated to the training distribution is the obvious first lever. Seed round 1 with residual features and short windows based on domain priors for actuator-fault detection.

result.description: Round 1 best — window=30, residuals_only, adaptive_3sigma, per_flight (FAR 0.00/hr, lat 1269ms)

plateau.evidence: Huge jump 0.000 -> 0.667 — adaptive threshold was the key. Still climbing.

stagnation.evidence: First real round; broad seed configs.

directive.rationale: adaptive_3sigma + residuals_only consistently passes the gate at F1=0.667. percentile_99 underperforms. The residuals_plus_derivatives feature set and isolation_forest model are still under-explored.

result.description: Round 2 best — window=100, residuals_plus_derivatives, global (FAR 0.00/hr, lat 629ms) — no F1 gain

plateau.evidence: F1 stuck at 0.667 for a second round — derivatives + longer windows did NOT help.

directive.rationale: F1 is plateauing at 0.667 and residuals_plus_derivatives is not improving it. Latency varies widely (629-3101ms) so there is room to optimize speed. Try percentile_99 and isolation_forest combinations to break the F1 ceiling while keeping FAR controlled.

result.description: Round 3 best — window=30, residuals_plus_derivatives, isolation_forest, percentile_99 (1 config FAILED the FAR gate at 273/hr)

false_alarm_gate.evidence: percentile_99 produced a config at FAR 273.14/hr — FAILED the 2.0/hr gate. percentile_99 is risky.

plateau.evidence: Third round still at 0.667; exploration has not cracked the ceiling.

stagnation.evidence: Coverage is broad but converging on what works: adaptive_3sigma + residuals_only.

directive.rationale: Exploration is exhausted: adaptive_3sigma reliably passes the FAR gate, percentile_99 is dangerous, and derivatives don't help. STOP exploring — EXPLOIT the winning family (adaptive_3sigma + residuals_only) and sweep window length + model to push F1 past 0.667.

result.description: Round 4 WINNER — window=30, residuals_only, isolation_forest, adaptive_3sigma, global (F1 0.800, FAR 0.00/hr, lat 1220ms)

plateau.evidence: Broke the plateau: 0.667 -> 0.800 by exploiting adaptive_3sigma + residuals_only + isolation_forest with a short window.

stagnation.evidence: Clear winner identified; further sweeping shows diminishing returns.

directive.rationale: The EXPLOIT round paid off: F1 jumped 0.667 -> 0.800 with zero false alarms. A short 30-step window wins because fault onset is sharp. This beats the never-firing baseline decisively and satisfies the FAR gate — COMMIT this configuration as the delivered detector.
next_hypotheses: Fault-type-specific detector (MoE) for the missed aileron-pair failures

summary.headline: Delivered an early-warning fault detector: F1 0.000 → 0.800, zero false alarms.
learned: Adaptive threshold is essential — the default fixed threshold never fires (F1=0.000); adaptive_3sigma calibrates to the data and reaches F1=0.800.
Optimal window is short (30 steps): fault onset is sharp, so long averaging hurts.
percentile_99 is dangerous — it blew the false-alarm gate (273/hr); adaptive_3sigma stays at 0.00/hr.
summary.honest_limit: left_aileron + right_aileron simultaneous failure: recall 0.00 (missed entirely). Next step: a fault-type-specific (mixture-of-experts) detector.

replay.note: No human tuned this detector — the research agent found this configuration. On a held-out fault flight it caught the engine failure 437ms after onset.
